calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558782 WITH CASE CGC-18-571148
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY's MOTION FOR AN ORDER CONSOLIDATING ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558782 WITH CASE CGC-18-571148.

The motion of Defendant and Cross-Complainant Sunset Scavenger Company for an order consolidating actions is granted. This action raises issues of fact and law common to the previously consolidated actions, and consolidation of these matters for all purposes including trial therefore is appropriate pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1048(a)

The Court will sign the corrected proposed order included with the reply papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
